title: Hiro's Animal Snack Friends
synopsis: Little Hiro discovers different animals and the yummy snacks they love to eat, learning about foods through magical animal friends.

pages.text: Hiro loves snack time! Today he meets animal friends who love food too.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sits at a colorful picnic table with steam rising from magical bowls of fruit, crackers, and milk with sparkles and drips
illustration.alt: Hiro sitting at a magical snack table

pages.text: Bunny hops up. 'I love carrots!' says Bunny. Crunch, crunch, crunch!

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face watches a fluffy white bunny eating giant sparkly orange carrots with exaggerated proportions and magical steam

pages.text: Bear waddles over. 'I love honey!' says Bear. The honey drips and sparkles.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sits next to a brown bear eating from a giant honey pot with golden drips and magical sparkles

pages.text: Cat purrs softly. 'I love milk!' says Cat. The milk is creamy white.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face pets an orange tabby cat drinking from a large bowl of milk with creamy swirls and sparkles

pages.text: Monkey swings down. 'I love bananas!' says Monkey. Yellow and sweet!

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face looks up at a brown monkey holding giant yellow bananas with magical sparkles and steam

pages.text: Hiro claps his hands. 'I love all the yummy foods!' All friends share and eat together happily.

illustration.description: Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sits at a feast table with bunny, bear, cat, and monkey, surrounded by carrots, honey, milk, bananas with magical sparkles and celebration
illustration.alt: Hiro and animal friends sharing food feast

metadata.illustrationStyle: delicious appetizing food, exaggerated proportions, steam drips sparkles, magical food, diverse cuisines, feast celebration, cooking scenes, yummy visual, food joy

questions.question: What does Bunny love to eat?
questions.explanation: Bunny says 'I love carrots!' and goes crunch, crunch, crunch!

questions.question: What does Bear love to eat?
questions.explanation: Bear loves honey that drips and sparkles!

questions.question: What do all the friends do at the end?
questions.explanation: All the animal friends share and eat together happily with Hiro!
